youtube.title: GCP Interview Q6: Scalable ETL w/ Dataflow & BigQuery #Shorts
youtube.description: Dive into designing a highly scalable, fault-tolerant ETL pipeline on GCP. Data is ingested via Pub/Sub or batch from Cloud Storage, processed by Cloud Dataflow (leveraging Apache Beam, Flex Templates, and UDFs) for both streaming and batch analytics. BigQuery serves as the analytical powerhouse, enabling real-time insights. The pipeline ensures data quality, handles schema evolution dynamically, and incorporates Data Loss Prevention and Data Catalog for governance. Monitor end-to-end performance and health with Stackdriver. Master this architecture for your next Cloud Architect interview!

thumbnail.headline: Scalable ETL on GCP
thumbnail.subheadline: Dataflow & BigQuery for Real-time Analytics & Quality

instagram.caption:
Build robust, scalable ETL on GCP!

- Real-time analytics with Dataflow & BigQuery.
- Master schema evolution & data quality.
- Fault-tolerant processing for critical data.
- Leverage Pub/Sub, Cloud Storage & Apache Beam.
